title: ternatea flagellaris
intro: Ternatea flagellaris, also known as Cordyceps ternipes, is a type of fungus that belongs to the family Clavicipitaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Ternatea flagellaris include improved cardiovascular health, enhanced athletic performance, and boosted immune function, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine. Ternatea flagellaris can be prepared in various herbal preparations, such as capsules, tablets, and teas, to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
